mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, password, profile, image_url AS imageUrl FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, category_id AS categoryId, item_name AS itemName, study_time AS studyTime, study_date AS studyDate, created_at AS createdAt, update_at AS updateAt FROM learning_data WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
